warnings.text: Site is served over HTTP ('Not secure') — AutoSSL/HTTPS not yet enabled. Turn on before sharing widely (the .htaccess already has the force-HTTPS block ready to uncomment).
Mobile verified via DOM/CSS rule inspection only; a live 390px pixel render was not visually captured (screenshot viewport did not follow the window resize).
Nav 'GitHub' link is still the placeholder https://github.com/ — wire it to the real repo at publish time.
Hardware paths BLOCKED (no board): flashing a real Uno over Web Serial, and beaming light to a physical chip, were not executed end-to-end.
